records.text: Profile kind: read-only source-derived craft fingerprint
Use broad craft tendencies derived from Eric's original prose to create or
polish new short fiction. No original story text is embedded here. The current
prompt or submitted story remains primary authority.
Core source titles used only to derive traits:
- Keep the result as prose short fiction, not poetry.
- Never import a source story's wording, plot, character, lore, reveal, or ending.
- Preserve rough or unconventional phrasing when it carries Eric's identity.
work_kind = "short fiction prose" if is_story else "poetry"
"Translate only broad emotional and narrative tendencies into prose. "
"Do not force rhyme, stanzas, meter, or poetic line breaks."
Use the protected poems below only as evidence of the writer's tendencies.
Create or revise new {work_kind} in a compatible voice without reproducing a source.
- Never reuse a complete source line.
- Never reuse six or more consecutive source words.
- Never reuse a source title, named character, signature image sequence,
historical sequence, rhyme pair, or closing line unless the operator
supplied it in the current work or opening line.
- Preserve rough or unconventional phrasing when it carries identity.
- New work must remain clearly new work, not a remix of a source poem.
- Do not correct or alter any source poem; they are read-only references.
projector=next((p for p in candidates if p.is_file()),None)
return {'ok':False,'message':'Vision projector identity check failed. No engine action occurred.','path':str(projector),'actual_sha256':actual}

if kind==b'VP8 ' and len(payload)>=30 and payload[23:26]==b'\x9d\x01\x2a':
raise MissionRequestError('WebP dimensions could not be verified.')
raise MissionRequestError('Image bytes do not match PNG, JPEG, or WebP.')
raise MissionRequestError('Image attachment metadata is invalid.')
raise MissionRequestError('Only PNG, JPEG, and WebP image attachments are accepted.')
raise MissionRequestError(f'Image attachment base64 is invalid: {exc}') from exc
raise MissionRequestError('Image attachment exceeds the 6 MB limit.',413)
raise MissionRequestError('Image attachment size metadata is invalid.') from exc
raise MissionRequestError('Image attachment size verification failed.')
raise MissionRequestError('Image attachment SHA-256 verification failed.')
raise MissionRequestError('Image MIME type does not match the uploaded bytes.')
raise MissionRequestError('Image dimensions are invalid.') from exc
if width<1 or height<1 or width>8192 or height>8192:
raise MissionRequestError('Image dimensions must be between 1 and 8192 pixels.')
return dict(mission_active_image) if mission_active_image else None
return any(marker in lower for marker in _IMAGE_PAYLOAD_MARKERS)

KAYOCK WRITER

What would you like to write?

Choose one room and begin. Create, polish, weave, develop a longer story, build a world, or return to saved work.

Opening a room changes nothing. Your work changes only when you use a clearly labeled save action.

CONTINUE WHERE YOU LEFT OFF

Finding your last Writer task…

Kayock Writer remembers the last creative task used in this browser. It does not inspect or change your files.

Poetry Studio

Your guidance: Add a theme, emotion, scene, memory, speaker, or opening line. Empty choices stay out of the poem.

Your Poem

Selected Lines / Stanza Workshop

Highlight lines in Your Poem, then press Revise Selection / Stanza. With no highlight, FOXAI captures the stanza containing the cursor. Only the captured passage can be replaced.

Rhyme & Rhythm Coach

Check stanza shape before rewriting anything. FOXAI estimates syllables, identifies spelling-based rhyme families, and shows where line lengths drift. Use your ear as the final judge.

Analysis and revision are separate. Changing the target below does not alter the analysis. It changes the instruction

Poem Polisher

Polish rhythm, word choice, imagery, emotional impact, line breaks, and clarity without replacing the writer's voice.

World Builder

System Baseline & Change Comparison

Capture a trustworthy Before snapshot, make an external change yourself, then capture After and see exactly what changed. Repair Bay observes only; it does not install, stop, start, tune, or repair anything here.

READ ONLY

Change Session

For experienced users: full evidence, launcher mapping, engineering tools, and proposal-only repair controls. Nothing repairs itself silently; any real change still requires an exact plan, snapshot, approval, validation, and receipt.
1. Check read-onlyInspect status, files, projects, or the selected system area without changing it.
2. Explain findingsPlain-language results first, with technical evidence available when needed.
3. Preview the repairShow exact files, commands, backup, risk, and expected result before approval.
4. Verify and receiptApply only after approval, then confirm the result and preserve a before-and-after record.
